name: Aa-Perm
algorithm: x' R' U R' D2 R U' R' D2 R2 x
diagram:
A   B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UBR ↻ UFL ↻ UFR

name: Ab-Perm
algorithm: x' R U' R D2 R' U R D2 R2 x
diagram:
A   B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UBR ↺ UFR ↺ UFL

name: E-Perm
algorithm: x' R U' R' D R U R' D' R U R' D R U' R' D' x
diagram:
A ↔ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↔ UBL, UFR ↔ UBR

name: F-Perm
algorithm: R' U' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U' R U R' U R

name: Ga-Perm
algorithm: R2 U R' U R' U' R U' R2 D U' R' U R D'
diagram:
A ↻ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↻ UFR ↻ UBR
Edges:   UL  ↻ UR  ↻ UF

name: Gb-Perm
algorithm: F' U' F R2 u R' U R U' R u' R2
diagram:
A ↺ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↺ UBR ↺ UFR
Edges:   UL  ↺ UF  ↺ UR

name: Gc-Perm
algorithm: R2 U' R U' R U R' U R2 D' U R U' R' D
diagram:
A ↻ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↻ UBR ↻ UFR
Edges:   UL  ↻ UF  ↻ UR

name: Gd-Perm
algorithm: R U R' y' R2 u' R U' R' U R' u R2
diagram:
A ↺ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↺ UFR ↺ UBR
Edges:   UL  ↺ UR  ↺ UF

name: H-Perm
algorithm: M2 U M2 U2 M2 U M2

name: Ja-Perm
algorithm: y' R' U L' U2 R U' R' U2 R L
diagram:
┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFR ↔ UBR
Edges:   UB  ↔ UR

name: Jb-Perm
algorithm: R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U'
diagram:
┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↔ UFR
Edges:   UF  ↔ UR

name: Na-Perm
algorithm: R U R' U R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U2 R U' R'
diagram:
A ↔ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↔ UBR
Edges:   UF  ↔ UB

name: Nb-Perm
algorithm: R' U L' U2 R U' L R' U L' U2 R U' L
diagram:
A ↔ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFR ↔ UBL
Edges:   UF  ↔ UB

name: Ra-Perm
algorithm: R U' R' U' R U R D R' U' R D' R' U2 R'
diagram:
┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↔ UFR
Edges:   UL  ↔ UB

name: Rb-Perm
algorithm: R' U2 R U2 R' F R U R' U' R' F' R2 U'
diagram:
┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↔ UFR
Edges:   UR  ↔ UB

name: T-Perm
algorithm: R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U' R U R' F'
diagram:
┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFR ↔ UBR
Edges:   UL  ↔ UR

name: Ua-Perm
algorithm: R U' R U R U R U' R' U' R2

name: Ub-Perm
algorithm: R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R'

name: V-Perm
algorithm: R' U R' U' y R' F' R2 U' R' U R' F R F
diagram:
A ↔ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘  
Corners: UFL ↔ UBR
Edges:   UF  ↔ UR

name: Y-Perm
algorithm: F R U' R' U' R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R F'
diagram:
A ↔ B  
  ┌───┐  
  │ █ │  
  └───┘

Edges:   UF  ↔ UR

name: Z-Perm
algorithm: M2 U M2 U M' U2 M2 U2 M' U2
